name: I have a pre-existing back issue, can I claim new work aggravation in Ogden?
description: Yes for work-aggravated pre-existing; prove with medical link.[1]

mainEntity.name: I have a pre-existing back issue, can I claim new work aggravation in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes for work-aggravated pre-existing; prove with medical link.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes if work injury aggravated it; comp covers aggravation of pre-existing conditions if work-related.[1] Doctor must link worsening to job.[2] Key factors: Medical opinion on causation; before/after comparisons. Practical guidance: Get specialist eval; document work exposure. Insurers scrutinize these—use attorney.[1] Aggravation qualifies fully.[2]
